Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The CellSizeInBytesFromFormat method returns the byte size of each encoded cell for the specified image and data format combination.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: constexpr static size_t CellSizeInBytesFromFormat(SourceImageFormat imageFormat, SourceDataFormat dataFormat); constexpr static size_t CellSizeInBytesFromFormat(ImageFormat imageFormat, DataFormat dataFormat);

SubSection.Title: Return value
SubSection.ReturnValue: The byte size of one encoded texture cell for the specified image and data format combination.
